core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.general_idea: Change behavior to silently add a port to the reserved list if reservation fails, instead of throwing a RuntimeException.
core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.human_impl: Commented out 'throw new RuntimeException(...)' and added 'reserved.add(Integer.parseInt(property)); return;'

core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.general_idea: Correct a bug where the loop iterated over the original class instead of the current superclass in the hierarchy traversal.
core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.human_impl: Changed `clazz.getDeclaredFields()` to `current.getDeclaredFields()` inside the do-while loop.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Replace the generic Spring RestTemplate bean with a specific OpenAPI-generated PetApi client to align with the new API structure.
Introduce a configurable base URL via Spring @Value to allow dynamic endpoint targeting for the API client.
Instantiate and configure the ApiClient with the base path before creating the PetApi instance.
Add SLF4J logging to trace the configuration of the API client base path during startup.
Replace manual RestTemplate usage with a generated OpenAPI client (PetApi) to simplify HTTP interaction and type safety.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Autowired PetApi instead of RestTemplate and replaced manual RequestEntity construction with petApi.addPet(inputPet).

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Update imports to use model classes from the generated OpenAPI client package instead of the old library or manual definitions.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Changed imports from org.openapitools.model.Pet to com.github.skjolber.pet.model.Pet and added Category import.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Remove the @Value injection for the URL since the generated client handles endpoint configuration internally.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Removed @Value("${my.url}") private String myUrl; and associated import.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Simplify method signature by delegating exception handling to the generated client's specific ApiException.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Changed throws Exception to throws ApiException and removed try-catch block for RestClientException.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Populate additional fields in the Pet object to match the requirements or expectations of the new API client.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Added setId, setStatus, and setCategory calls on the input Pet object before sending.

examples/demo/src/test/java/com/example/.general_idea: Replace deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE with APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with Spring Framework 6.x standards.
Explicitly define the mock endpoint path to ensure correct routing in the updated testing framework.
Switch from verbose ArgumentMatchers to static imports for cleaner Mockito stubbing syntax.
Correct the assertion in the failure test case to properly handle exceptions and verify mock interactions.
Add new test cases to verify successful pet creation scenarios with proper response validation.
Replace deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE with APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with Spring Framework 6.x changes.
Specify the base path for the mocked endpoint to match the updated API configuration.
Wrap service call in try-catch to handle ApiException thrown by the updated client library.
Update import statements to reflect changes in the generated OpenAPI client package structure.

jetty/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/.general_idea: Update the WebAppContext import to use the Jetty 12 (ee10) package structure.
Update the Configuration array type to use the Jetty 12 (ee10) package to match the new WebAppContext.
Update imports to use the Jetty 12 (EE10) package structure instead of the legacy EE9 packages.
Add explicit super constructor call with a Builder instance to satisfy Jetty 12 API changes for AbstractConfiguration.
Update imports and type casting to use the new Jetty 12 (EE10) package structure and ServletContextApi interface.

junit5/core-junit5/src/main/java/com/git.general_idea: Implement AutoCloseable interface to ensure the embedded server is destroyed when the extension lifecycle ends.
junit5/core-junit5/src/main/java/com/git.human_impl: implements AutoCloseable { @Override public void close() { server.destroy(); } }

junit5/core-junit5/src/main/java/com/git.general_idea: Add a static flag to track if the extension has been initialized to prevent redundant setup operations.
Register the extension instance in the global JUnit 5 store to allow access across the test suite.

junit5/jetty/src/test/java/com/github/sk.general_idea: Replace the deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE constant with APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with Spring Framework 6.x changes.
Replace the deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE constant with APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with Spring Framework 6.x standards.
